steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content: The $y$-intercept of the graph occurs where $x=0$. Since the graph is $y=f(x)$, the requested $y$-coordinate is the value of $f(0)$.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Substitute $0$ for $x$ in the function:
$$f(0)=-7(0)+11=11$$
The computed output is the $y$-coordinate of the intercept, not the full ordered pair. The answer is 11.
